pages.text: AboutMyself ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- My name is 吴子昊 New students transferring to Network Engineering glad to be classmates with everyone easygoing active If u wanna know more, plz contact me via wechat: A1icaa AboutMyHobbies ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- playing computer games like csgo, apex, lol, fifaol4, etc. learning in-depth mathematical knowledge playing soccer going to movies

posts.title: CINTA-ONE
posts.text:
CINTA-ONE 1. 迭代版本的简单乘法 12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031323334353637383940414243444546474849505152535455565758596061626364656667686970#define _CRT_SECURE_NO_WARNINGS 1#include <stdio.h>// 简单乘法int multiply1(int a, int b);// 简单乘法的第二种思路int multiply2(int a, int b);// 迭代version的简单乘法int multiply3(int a, int b);// 判断一个数是否为偶数bool Iseven(int a);int main() { printf("乘积为：%d
", multiply1(19, 20)); printf("乘积为：%d
", multiply2(19, 20)); printf("乘积为：%d
", multiply3(19, 20)); return 0;}int multiply1(int a, int b){ if (b == 0) return 0; else return a + multiply1(a, b - 1);}int multiply2(int a, int b){ int res = 0; for (int i = 0; i < b; i++) { res += a; } return res;}int multiply3(int a, int b){ int res = 0; if (Iseven(b) == 1) { for (int i = 0; i < (b / 2); i++) { res += a; } res *= 2; return res; } else { for (int i = 0; i < (b / 2); i++) { res += a; } res *= 2; res += a; return res; }}bool Iseven(int a){ if (a % 2 == 0) return true; else return false;} 2. 证明除法算法 2.1 除法算法 对任意给定的整数a和b，其中b > 0，存在唯一的整数对q（商）和r（余数）使得， \[ a = qb + r \] 且 0 ≤ r < b。 2.2 证明过程 2.2.1 证明存在性 构造集合 \[ S = \{a-bk:k\in Z\ 且\ a-bk \ge 0 \} \] 显然，集合S非空，由良序原则，存在一个最小元\[r \in S\ 且 \ r=a-qb\] 因此，\[a = qb + r, r\ge 0\] 我们采用反证法，假设最小元r>b，则 \[\exists t\in Z\ s.t.\ r = tb + r^*\] 则有 \[ a=qb+r=qb+tb+r^*=(q+t)b+r^* \] 令 \[ q+t = q^* \in Z\] 则有 \[ a=q^*b+r^* \] \[此时存在r^*<r,则此时的最小元为r^*,与假设矛盾.\] \[综上:0\leq r< b\] Q.E.D 2.2.2 证明唯一性 \[我们才用反证法，假设存在两对(q_1,r_1)(q_2,r_2)\] 满足\[a=qb+r\] 其中\[q_1
e q_2,\ r_1
e r_2,\ 0\leq r_1 < b,\ 0\leq r_2 < b\]则有： \[ q_1b+r_1=q_2b+r_2 \] 处理得： \[ (q_1-q_2)b=(r_2-r_1) \] 即 \[ b\mid(r_2-r_1)\ \] 又 \[  ecause 0\leq r_1 < b,\ 0\leq r_2 < b\ \] \[ 	herefore -b<r_2-r_1<b \] \[ 	herefore r_2-r_1 = 0 \] \[与假设不符，故只存在一对(q,r)\ s.t.\ 0\leq r < b\ 且\ a=qb+r\] Q.E.D 3. 程序 3.1 迭代版本的gcd 12345678910111213141516171819202122232425262728293031#define _CRT_SECURE_NO_WARNINGS 1#include <stdio.h>int gcd(int a, int b);int main(){ int a, b; printf("请输入a,b
"); scanf("%d,%d",&a,&b); printf("a和b最大公因数为：%d", gcd(a, b)); return 0;}int gcd(int a, int b){ int temp; if (a < b) { temp = b; b = a; a = temp; } while (a % b) { temp = b; b = a % b; a = temp; } return b;} 3.2 迭代版本的egcd 1234567891011121314151617181920212223242526272829303132333435363738394041424344#define _CRT_SECURE_NO_WARNINGS 1#include <stdio.h>// ra+sb = gcd(a,b)void egcd(int a, int b);int main(){ int a, b; printf("请输入a,b
"); scanf("%d,%d", &a, &b); egcd(a, b); return 0;}void egcd(int a, int b){ int s1 = 1; int r0 = 1; int s0 = 0; int r1 = 0; int q; int temp; int res_r; int res_s; int res_gcd; while (b) { q = a / b; temp = a; a = b; b = temp % b; temp = r0; r0 = r1; r1 = temp - q * r1; temp = s0; s0 = s1; s1 = temp - q * s1; } res_r = r0; res_s = s0; res_gcd = a; printf("r=%d,s=%d,gcd(a,b)=%d", res_r, res_s, res_gcd);} 3.3 基于gcd算法实现的函数 123456789101112131415161718192021222324252627282930313233343536#define _CRT_SECURE_NO_WARNINGS 1#include <stdio.h>int gcd(int a, int b);int main(){ int n; printf("请输入n
"); scanf("%d", &n); int count = 0; for (int i = 1; i < n; i++) { if (gcd(n, i) == 1) count++; } printf("%d", count); return 0;}int gcd(int a, int b){ int temp; if (a < b) { temp = b; b = a; a = temp; } while (a % b) { temp = b; b = a % b; a = temp; } return b;} 4. 第二章的第6、8题 4.1 第6题 \[假设g^a\equiv1\ (mod\ m)\ 且\ g^b\equiv 1(mod\ m),请证明：g^{gcd(a,b)}\equiv 1(mod\ m).\] 证明： \[由B\acute{e}zout定理可得：\] \[ gcd(a,b)=ar+bs \] 且a与b的最大公因子是唯一的。 即证： \[ g^{ar＋bs}\equiv1(mod\ m)\ \] 又 \[ g^a\equiv1\ (mod\ m)\ \Rightarrow\ g^a=k_1m+1\ g^b\equiv1\ (mod\ m)\ \Rightarrow\ g^b=k_2m+1 \] 又 \[ g^a·g^b = (k_1m+1)·(k_2m+1)=k_1k_2m+k_1m+k_2m+1\ (g^a·g^b)\ mod\ m =(k_1k_2m+k_1m+k_2m+1)\ mod\ m =1 \] 故 \[ g^{a+b}\equiv1(mod\ m) \] 即证： \[ (g^a)^r\equiv 1(mod\ m)\ (g^b)^s\equiv 1(mod\ m) \] \[  ecause(g^a)^r=(k_1m+1)^r=C_r^0(k_1m)^r1^0+C_r^1(k_1m)^{r-1}1^1+...+C_r^{r-1}(k_1m)^11^{r-1}+C_r^r(k_1m)^01^r\ \ \ \ \ \ (g^b)^s=(k_2m+1)^s=C_s^0(k_2m)^s1^0+C_s^1(k_2m)^{s-1}1^1+...+C_s^{s-1}(k_2m)^11^{s-1}+C_s^s(k_2m)^01^s\ \] 显然， \[ [C_r^0(k_1m)^r1^0+C_r^1(k_1m)^{r-1}1^1+...+C_r^{r-1}(k_1m)^11^{r-1}+C_r^r(k_1m)^01^r] \ mod\ m =\ C_r^r(k_1m)^01^r\ mod\ m=1 \] \[ 	herefore (g^a)^r\equiv 1(mod\ m)\ \] 同理可得： \[ (g^b)^s\equiv 1(mod\ m) \] \[ 	herefore (g^a)^r·(g^b)^s \equiv 1(mod\ m) \Leftrightarrow g^{ar＋bs}\equiv1(mod\ m)\Leftrightarrow g^{gcd(a,b)}\equiv1(mod\ m) \] Q.E.D 4.2 第8题 \[证明：如果gcd(a,b)=d,则gcd(a/d,b/d)=1\] 证明： \[ ecause gcd(a,b)=d\] 可知a与b的最大公因数为d。 \[Ⅰ.当a
eq b时\] \[设\exists t_1,t_2 \in Z\ 且 t_1
eq t_2 
eq 0\ ,\ s.t.\] \[ a=t_1d\ b=t_2d\ \] \[假设gcd(t_1,t_2)=k
eq 1,则必\exists d^* = kd,s.t.\ d^*>d,与题意不符\] \[即t_1与t_2互素\] 又： \[ a/d = t_1\ b/d = t_2 \] \[故gcd(a/d,b/d)=1\]。 \[Ⅱ.当a=b时\] 易知：\[a=b=d\] \[则gcd(a/d,b/d)= gcd(1,1)=1\] Q.E.D
